# Realtor Desk

> AI-powered CRM built for Canadian real estate agents. 24/7 bilingual (English · French) AI lead response, kanban pipeline with 0–100 lead scoring, and PIPEDA-native Canadian data residency. CREA DDF® integration on the roadmap for Q3 2026.

Realtor Desk is a public-beta CRM from Brainfy AI Inc. (Edmonton, AB) for licensed Canadian real estate agents, teams, and brokerages. The product's core differentiator is native bilingual (EN/FR) AI lead response — no Canadian competitor currently offers this. Compliance is opinionated: CASL-compliant email footers are automatic, consent is timestamped on every lead, and Quebec Law 25 / PIPEDA / FINTRAC workflows are first-class. Pricing is in CAD, not USD.

Canonical brand name: "Realtor Desk" (two words). The `.ai` TLD communicates the technology — it is not part of the product name. "Realtor®" is a protected trademark of the Canadian Real Estate Association (CREA); Realtor Desk is not affiliated with or endorsed by CREA.

Stage: public beta as of 2026-04. Some features marketed on the roadmap page (CREA DDF sync, Centris Quebec sync, voice AI) are not yet shipped — see /roadmap for dated commitments.

## Core pages

- [Home](https://www.realtordesk.ai/): Landing page — hero, bilingual AI demo, trust strip, feature grid, kanban preview, BoldTrail comparison, testimonial, CTA.
- [Features](https://www.realtordesk.ai/features): Three-pillar feature breakdown (AI that closes, lead intelligence, built for Canada) and eight capability cards (CREA DDF sync roadmap, website chat widget, CASL email sequences, showing calendar, team routing, roles & permissions, audit log, reporting).
- [Pricing](https://www.realtordesk.ai/pricing): Three CAD tiers — Solo ($149/mo or $999/yr), Team ($299/mo or $2,997/yr, includes 5 users), Brokerage (custom). 14-day trial, no credit card. GST/HST applied at checkout per billing province.
- [How it works](https://www.realtordesk.ai/how-it-works): Five-step onboarding (sign up, connect tools, train the AI, customize, go live). Documented setup time: ~20 minutes.
- [Integrations](https://www.realtordesk.ai/integrations): Native integrations, iPaaS connectors (Zapier, Make, n8n — 5,000+ apps), and a roadmap queue (Salesforce, Zoho, Pipedrive, WhatsApp Cloud API, LinkedIn Lead Gen Forms, Facebook Lead Ads, Centris for Quebec MLS).
- [Product roadmap](https://www.realtordesk.ai/roadmap): Dated commitments. CREA DDF integration targeted Q3 2026. Last updated 2026-04-20.

## Compare

- [vs BoldTrail](https://www.realtordesk.ai/compare/boldtrail): Canadian-hosted data vs US-only; bilingual EN/FR built-in vs $$ add-on; CAD vs USD+20%; <45 s AI response vs 2–3 min.
- [vs Follow Up Boss](https://www.realtordesk.ai/switch-from-follow-up-boss)
- [vs Lofty (formerly Chime)](https://www.realtordesk.ai/switch-from-lofty)
- [vs IXACT Contact](https://www.realtordesk.ai/switch-from-ixact)
- [vs Wise Agent](https://www.realtordesk.ai/switch-from-wise-agent)
- [vs LionDesk](https://www.realtordesk.ai/switch-from-liondesk)

## Canadian-compliance content

- [Privacy Policy](https://www.realtordesk.ai/privacy-policy): Canadian data residency, PIPEDA alignment, consent timestamps, revocation workflow. (French version in progress — Quebec Law 25.)
- [PIPEDA compliance](https://www.realtordesk.ai/pipeda-compliance)
- [FINTRAC compliance](https://www.realtordesk.ai/fintrac-compliance)
- [Canadian market](https://www.realtordesk.ai/canadian-market): Province-specific regulator coverage — OACIQ (Quebec), RECO (Ontario), RECA (Alberta), RECBC (British Columbia).

## Resources

- [Resources index](https://www.realtordesk.ai/resources): Blog + guides. Topics include AI lead response benchmarks, CASL requirements for realtors, Canadian housing market forecasts, first-time buyer guides, and CRM comparisons.

## About · contact · careers

- [FAQ](https://www.realtordesk.ai/faq)
- [Contact](https://www.realtordesk.ai/contact): support@realtordesk.ai. Edmonton, Alberta, Canada. Bilingual EN/FR support; average reply under 24 hours.
- [Careers](https://www.realtordesk.ai/careers): Remote-friendly roles across engineering, customer success, and growth.

## Account

- [Sign in](https://www.realtordesk.ai/login)
- [Start free trial](https://www.realtordesk.ai/signup)
- [Unsubscribe](https://www.realtordesk.ai/unsubscribe): CASL-compliant one-click opt-out (transactional page; not indexed).

## Bilingual

Every public page supports French via `?lang=fr` — English is the default. The French wordmark is the same (`Realtor Desk`). Canadian-French typography conventions are enforced in copy: 24-hour time (`19 h`), narrow no-break space before `%` and `$` (`32 s`, `1,4 M$ CA`), decimal comma. Regulatory acronyms swap: PIPEDA → LPRPDE, CASL → LCAP, FINTRAC → CANAFE, CREA DDF → SDD de l'ACI.

## Optional

- [Full content export](https://www.realtordesk.ai/llms-full.txt): Plain-text export of the key public pages for LLM training / citation.
- [XML sitemap](https://www.realtordesk.ai/sitemap.xml)
- [Robots.txt](https://www.realtordesk.ai/robots.txt): GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot, Google-Extended, CCBot are all explicitly allowed.
